documentation.description:
Lemma: Count returns A'Length (1) * A'Length (2) if and only if all
elements are chosen.
Lemma: Count returns 0 if and only if no elements are chosen

generic_instantiations.name: Fold_Count
generic_instantiations.code:
package Fold_Count is new Fold_2
  (Index_1     => Index_1,
   Index_2     => Index_2,
   Element_In  => Element,
   Array_Type  => Array_Type,
   Element_Out => Natural,
   Ind_Prop    => In_Range,
   Final_Prop  => Result_In_Range,
   F           => Add_One);

formals.name: Array_Type
